articles.title: A former Thiel fellow’s startup just launched a drone it says can replace police helicopters
articles.description: Brinc launched its newest 911 response drone this week, as the company seeks to expand its prominence in the public safety industry.
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: Amazon just bought a startup making kid-size humanoid robots
articles.description: The acquisition of Fauna Robotics is the second robotics startup Amazon has purchased this month.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
articles.description: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.
articles.author: Marina Temkin

articles.title: New Mexico just handed Meta its first courtroom defeat over child safety, and the rest of the country is watching
articles.description: The dollar amount isn’t as important as the fact that this is the first jury verdict of its kind against Meta over harm to young people.
articles.author: Connie Loizos

articles.title: Lululemon bets Epoch Biodesign can eat its shorts, literally
articles.description: Startup Epoch Biodesign uses enzymes to break plastic waste down into monomers, the chemical building blocks that can be used to make new plastic.
articles.author: Tim De Chant
